name: Vedangi  Kulkarni
text:

Key Projects  & Technical  Contributions  
Fraud  Detection  Using  Graph  AI

Full-stack  app with  content -based  recommendation  and sentiment  analysis on  Kaggle  reviews using  scikit -learn,  pandas,  and NumPy.

Task  management  web app with dashboard  alerts  and MySQL  backend  for tracking  assignments.

GUI tool analyzing  sorting  & searching  algorithm  runtimes with  bar chart  visualization.

Appliance  control  (lights,  fans)  via mobile -call DTMF  tones decoded by  MT8870.

Prototype  using  MQ3  sensor  for alcohol  detection  and engine  lock, with buzzer,  relay,  motor,  and serial  monitoring.

CNN  model  with PyTorch  for real-time detection  via OpenCV  webcam  input. 
Tech: Python, PyTorch, OpenCV, CNN  
Agricultural  Drone  System  (Presented  at ICSTEM  2025)  
Physical  drone  with ML-powered  path planning  for pesticide  spraying,  nutrient  delivery,  real-time monitoring,  and data visualization. 
Tech: Python, ML Algorithms, Drone Hardware, Path Planning

name: VEDANGI  KULKARNI
text:
VEDANGI  KULKARNI  
Software  Developer  | Full Stack  Developer  | Python  Developer  | React  Developer  | Flask  | REST  API | Machine  Learning  | MongoDB  | MySQL  
| JavaScript  | Git | Agile  | fresher  | 0-1 years  
vedangi.kulkarni22@vit.edu  · +91-7715942338  · linkedin.com/in/vedangi -kulkarni  · github.com/vedangi -24 · Pune,  India  
 
 
PROFESSIONAL  SUMMARY  
 
Computer Engineering student (VIT Pune ) with 6 months of industry experience at Tech Mahindra building  AI-powered  full-
stack  systems  using  Python,  React,  Flask,  MongoDB,  and REST  APIs.  Shipped  10+ projects  spanning fraud detection, 
computer vision, and ML pipelines — three accepted at international IEEE conferences. Seeking a Software Developer or Full 
Stack Develope r role with 0 –1 years experience requirement, available to join immediately.  
 
EXPERIENCE  
 
Software  Developer  Intern  | Tech  Mahindra  Jun 2025 – Nov 2025  
• Production  Full-Stack  Development: Built and deployed  a React  + Flask  + MongoDB  application  for real-time AI 
intrusion alerts, handling end -to-end feature delivery across 3 Agile sprint cycles.  
• ML & REST  API Integration:  Integrated  Python/scikit -learn  ML classification  models  into a REST  API pipeline,  reducing 
false-positive alert rate by ~30% over r ule-based baselines.  
• Generative  AI & Computer  Vision: Engineered  Smart  Intrusion  Detection  System  using  GenAI  and OpenCV -based 
computer vision models in a cross -functional Agile team of 6.  
• On-time Delivery:  Owned  backend  API design  and model  integration — delivered  all milestones  within  a 6-month 
engagement.  
Machine  Learning  Intern  | Teachnook  × IIT Roorkee  2023  
• Predictive  ML Model:  Built a machine  failure  classification  model  in Python  and R with measurable  accuracy 
improvement over logistic baseline; adopted for program capstone showcase.  
• Feature  Engineering:  Performed  data cleaning,  cross -validation,  and feature  engineering  on industrial  sensor  datasets 
using RStudio, scikit -learn, and pandas.  
KEY PROJECTS  
 
Fraud  Detection  Using  Graph  AI | Python  · Flask  · Random  Forest  · NetworkX  · REST  API 
• Classified  fraudulent  transactions  with 80/20  train-test Random  Forest  model;  deployed  as Flask  REST  API web app with 
interactive NetworkX graph visualizations — red = fraud, blue = normal.  
• GitHub:  github.com/vedangi -24 
 
Agricultural  Drone  System  | Python  · ML · Path  Planning  · Hardware 
Presented at ICSTEM 2025 — International Conference  
• Built physical  autonomous  drone  with ML-powered  path planning  for precision  pesticide  spraying;  implemented  real-time 
data visualization dashboard for crop monitoring.  
 
Skin Cancer  Prediction  via Webcam  | Python  · PyTorch  · OpenCV  · CNN 
Presented at ICSVCE 2024 — International Conference  
• Trained  CNN  model  (PyTorch)  for real-time binary  skin lesion  classification  via OpenCV  webcam  input;  optimised 
pipeline to run on CPU without GPU infrastructure.  
 
Food  Ordering  Platform  with ML Recommendations  | Python  · Flask  · React  · scikit -learn  · JavaScript  
• Full-stack  web application  with content -based  recommendation  engine  and NLP sentiment  analysis  on Kaggle  restaurant 
reviews using scikit -learn, pandas, and NumPy.  
 
Student  Attendance  via Face  Recognition  | Python  · OpenCV  · TensorFlow ·  SQL · MySQL  
• Real-time face recognition  attendance  system  using  OpenCV  + TensorFlow;  auto-logs 100%  of entries  to SQL database, 
eliminating proxy attendance completely.  
 
Alcohol  Sensing  & Engine  Lock  System  | Arduino  · IoT · MQ3  Sensor  · Relay 
Presented at ICDMAI 2024 — International Conference  
• IoT safety  prototype  using  MQ3  sensor  to auto-engage  engine  lock relay  on alcohol  detection;  presented  at international 
conference on data management and AI.  EDUCATION  
 
B.Tech  — Computer  Engineering  | Vishwakarma  Institute  of Technology,  Pune  2022 – 2026  
• 3 research  papers  accepted  at IEEE  / international  conferences  within  2 years  of undergraduate  study.

ML & AI: Machine  Learning,  Deep  Learning,  Computer  Vision,  NLP,  Generative  AI, Random  Forest,  CNN,  Sentiment  Analysis  
Tools  & Platforms:  Git, GitHub,  VS Code,  Agile,  Jira, Figma,  Docker  (basic),  Linux  (basic),  Arduino  
Soft Skills:  Team  Leadership,  Agile  Delivery,  Cross -functional  Collaboration,  Technical  Documentation
